title: Tango Therapy: How the Dance of Passion Is Helping Parkinson’s Patients
summary_full: Once a week, patients in an Argentine hospital with Parkinson’s disease use the movements of tango to help address issues of balance, stiffness and coordination.
summary_public: Once a week, patients in an Argentine hospital with Parkinson’s disease use the movements of tango to help address issues of balance, stiffness and coordination.
